name: Stir-Fried Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
Preparation: 10 min Cooking 8 min
1. Cut zucchini into 1/4-inch pieces.
2. In a large skillet over high heat, add very hot salad oil and cook the zucchini, stirring quickly and frequently (stir-frying) until well coated in the oil.
3. Add water, salt, and sugar. Reduce heat to medium-high; continue stir-frying for 7 to 8 minutes until the zucchini is tender-crisp.
VARIATION: Use 1/4 salad oil, 1 large clove of garlic (sliced), and 6 cups of sliced cabbage. Cook the garlic until browned, discard it, then continue with the previous instructions.
